# doll

> doll is a local-complete, cloud-optional personal AI continuity system.

Current status: pre-alpha. No model runtime is connected yet.

Core idea: models are replaceable reasoning engines; the user's state and work are the durable core.

Official resources:
- Website: https://doll.badjoke-lab.com/
- Source repository: https://github.com/badjoke-lab/doll
- Specifications: https://github.com/badjoke-lab/doll/tree/main/docs/spec
- Roadmap: https://github.com/badjoke-lab/doll/blob/main/docs/spec/09-development-roadmap.md
- Long-form note: https://doll.badjoke-lab.com/notes/ai-will-remain/
- External DEV article: https://dev.to/badjoke-lab/why-im-building-doll-a-personal-ai-continuity-system-1a1c
- Privacy: https://doll.badjoke-lab.com/privacy/

Important limits:
- doll is not a foundation model.
- doll is not a finished product.
- doll is not a cloud-required assistant.
- Public claims should be checked against the repository, specifications, tests, and merged development history.
